text.text:
A fantastic experience and a belter of a massage. I had a deep tissue massage with Lynn and would thoroughly recommend it.

The place was very calming and the massage left me very chilled and in a  great floaty space.
Lynn checks in throughout the session to adjust the pressure and strength as needed. I will definitely be back!

text.text:
After phenomenal deep tissue and holistic massages with Lynn I thought it was about time I booked in for a lomi lomi. I have zero regrets. Lynn has flawless communication and remembered my preference for a side lying treatment which was made comfortable with pillows and bolsters.
The massage had a beautiful ebb and flow, the touch and pressure was intentional, I felt like I could melt into a sleepy, happy place.
You’re always in safe and caring hands with Lynn.

text.text:
I had the most amazing deep tissue massage from Lynn. HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

The space is beautiful, clean, welcoming and easy to find. Lynn welcomed me with a cup of tea and established great communication and comfort cues from the start.
She was very attentive throughout the massage, asking about pressure and made me feel very cared for. Great relaxing music plays throughout the massage and I really got to enjoy being in the moment.

I have already booked in my next session with Lynn! After 8 years in London, I’ve found a massage therapist that matches with my physical needs (being an athlete), my vibe (calm and intentional), and my wallet (great value for money).
Book in with Lynn for a trusting and reliable professional!

text.text: Absolutely loved my massage from Lynn. She has such a great quality of touch, her attention to detail and patience working on my muscles really allowed my nervous system to calm down and relax. Lynn checked in with me regularly on pressure and adapted to what I needed. I felt restored at the end of the massage. Probably one of the most relaxing massages I’ve ever had.

text.text: Wow. I had a wonderful massage yesterday with Idle Hands. After a busy day of travelling it was just what I needed. Lynn tailored the massage to the areas where I most needed and she had superb knowledge of the body. She welcomed communication about pressure throughout. I felt extremely comfortable and relaxed and didn’t want it to end! The cup of herbal tea at the end was most welcome too. Will definitely be back! Thank you 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
